name: process-design
description: Process Design with extra benefits — a thought-partner skill that walks you from a fuzzy intuition to a build-ready spec via Working Backwards, metrics-first design, Elon's algorithm, gap probing, TDD-style verification, drafting, adversarial verification, and an implementation-agnostic build handoff. Bundles qa-agents (adversarial three-agent review) for Phase 7 verification, the dmaic skill family (Define / Measure / Analyze / Improve / Control) for metrics review cycles, and elons-operating-algorithm (one-shot pressure test that runs Elon's full 5-step algorithm against any artifact — spec, plan, architecture, roadmap — and produces a structured deletion-first review). All nine skills callable independently.
